title: Re:Plethora
description: A peripheral provider for ComputerCraft, ported to Fabric, maintained by ReconnectedCC
body:
# Plethora Fabric
ReconnectedCC's maintained fork of Plethora, maintained and updated for ReconnectedCC.

## Rights
All rights to [the original code used on SwitchCraft3](https://github.com/SwitchCraftCC/Plethora-Fabric) go to Lemmmy and SquidDev, we are only building upon the codebase for our own featureset.

## 1.21
We have plans to update Plethora to 1.21 in the future, this is however a work in progress behind the scenes.
